title: Remove m_pkgp and m_classp from WidthVisitor
body:
This mitigates https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/4355.

The change removes m_pkgp and m_classp from the context of the WidthVisitor; they could have wrong values due to the visitor jumping from call nodes to function bodies.

There were 3 uses of these 2 vars:
1. Marking funcs as isFromStd -- I removed the property, it was intended to simplify special treatment of funcs from stdlib, but was eventually only used for std::process::self.
2. Changing type of std::process::self to built-in VlProcessRef -- now done together with detecting process::self.
3. Generating srandom etc. for classes -- now uses classOrPackagep (which, in turn, is set in LinkDot).

Also, I found using classOrPackagep properties quite confusing, so I added some details to their comments.
